description: Thirty open-ended Luna Light solver prompts share two fresh 12-case blocks. The two 15-call containers exist only to satisfy the registered per-strategy budget; offline analysis treats every lens as an individual prompt arm and may combine their candidates without new model calls.

strategies.name: General Prompt Lenses A
strategies.description: Fifteen constructive and structural prompt lenses, with deterministic plurality retained only as a diagnostic baseline.

stages.instruction: Solve independently. Compare plausible rules, test late visible terms as a holdout when practical, and return the most predictive compact continuation.

strategies.name: General Prompt Lenses B
strategies.description: Fifteen validation, adversarial, and diversifying prompt lenses, with deterministic plurality retained only as a diagnostic baseline.

stages.instruction: Solve independently. Compare plausible rules, test late visible terms as a holdout when practical, and return the most predictive compact continuation.
